3月收email有講
Policy on Transfer within FBE and Advanced Standing

Programme transfer applications will be assessed on individual basis. Applicant’s previous public examination result(s) and academic performance in the current programme will be taken into consideration. At the time of assessment, if applicant is subject to Faculty Review Committee (FRC) or Committee on Discontinuation (COD) deliberation, and the decision(s) of FRC and/or COD is(are) not yet known, his/her transfer application will NOT be considered.

Under normal circumstances, multiple attempts of intra-Faculty transfer at FBE should not be allowed. Each student will be allowed to have transfer once within the Faculty during his/her entire period of undergraduate studies.

Upon successful programme transfer, student will be informed about the details of application for advanced standing. All approved credits will be counted towards the graduation requirement of the new FBE programme upon transfer. From 2014-2015 onwards, all grades of the approved advanced standing credits will also be carried forward to the calculation of the CGPA and honour classification of the new FBE programme he/she is approved to be transferred to. Details of the advanced standing policy will be sent to successful programme transfer applicants by email in July 2017.
